results.title: Villaggio Italian Market to relocate, expand dining offerings
results.description: In a May 19 Facebook post, Villaggio Italian Market owners announced the eatery and market would be moving around the corner in an expansion project.

results.title: Republican Senator Says Trump Ballroom Funding Removed From Spending Bill
results.description: Republican Senator John Kennedy on Wednesday said there was insufficient support in the Senate to spend $1 billion on a planned White House ballroom and related security measures, and that the proposal would not be included in a $72 billion immigration enforcement bill.
